title: Ability to schedule Zoom meetings direct via Monday
excerpt: At the moment, Monday CRM’s Zoom integration is only able to pull data from Zoom, not modify it. You still have to schedule meetings via the Zoom app and manually input its information into the Emails & Activities sectio…

posts.author: iwinefordner (Ian)
posts.cookedHtml:
At the moment, Monday CRM’s Zoom integration is only able to pull data from Zoom, not modify it. You still have to schedule meetings via the Zoom app and manually input its information into the Emails & Activities section of a contact if you want it to show up there.

It would be great if you could create meetings via Zoom like you can with Google Meet.
